items.title: I've found Managed Agents to somehow be both the fastest way to hack together a weekend agent p…
items.content: I've found Managed Agents to somehow be both the fastest way to hack together a weekend agent project and the most robust way to ship one to millions of users. It eliminates all the complexity of self-hosting an agent but still allows a great degree of flexibility with setting up your harness, tools, skills, etc.
